action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 20 failed because the bash smoke-test command used cp on files that are the same inode, causing exit 1 before eval submission. The best test macro_f1 remains 0.4197. Analysis: With ~1 hour left, the highest-ROI move is to evaluate the proven checkpoints_v2/best.pt with stronger multi-scale TTA (6 views: 224/256/288 × original + hflip) without any risky bash commands. A clean rewrite of predict.py and model.py guarantees offline loading works. Decision: Write concise, correct predict.py (fp32-only, 6-view TTA) and model.py, then immediately submit checkpoints_v2/best.pt for evaluation. No bash command is issued to avoid spurious failures.
